  • Reference
    • Kang IFN-β PBMC: MOFA-FLEX from R to MOFA2
    • Bridging Single-Cell Multi-Omics: SCE and MAE to Python MuData
    • Zero-copy sparse bridge: SingleCellExperiment → scipy.sparse → AnnData
  • Changelog

Wrap a bare Python AnnData in a single-modality MuData

dot-maybe_wrap_anndata_in_mudata.Rd

MOFAFLEX only accepts MuData or a nested dict. When the user passes a single AnnData (e.g.\ the output of sce_to_reticulate_anndata), this helper transparently wraps it in mudata.MuData({"rna": adata}).

Usage

.maybe_wrap_anndata_in_mudata(py_obj, group_by = NULL)

Arguments

py_obj

A Python object extracted from the data argument.

group_by

Character vector of obs column names used for grouping, or NULL.

Value

Either py_obj unchanged (if it is already a MuData / dict), or a new mudata.MuData wrapping it.

Details

When group_by is supplied, the corresponding obs column(s) are promoted to the top-level mdata.obs (without a modality prefix)—which is required for MOFAFLEX(group_by=...) to find the column.

On this page
